q.en: In the 1993 World Series, what did Joe Carter do for the Toronto Blue Jays?
q.zh: 在1993年世界大赛中，Joe Carter 为多伦多蓝鸟队做了什么？

options.en: He pitched a perfect game.
options.zh: 他投出了一场完全比赛。

options.en: He stole home plate to win the game.
options.zh: 他盗本垒得分赢得比赛。

options.en: He hit a walk-off three-run home run in the bottom of the 9th to win the series.
options.zh: 他在第九局下半击出一支再见三垒打本垒打，赢下系列赛。

options.en: He caught a fly ball in center field. according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他在中外野接住了一个高飞球。（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: The opening chapter says Joe Carter hit a game-winning, series-winning, walk-off three-run home run in the bottom of the 9th — the first time in World Series history a player clinched it with a come-from-behind homer.
explain.zh: 开篇说 Joe Carter 在第九局下半击出一支致胜、夺系列赛、再见的三垒打本垒打——这是世界大赛史上首次有球员用逆转本垒打锁定胜局。

q.en: When was the first World Series played, and who played in it?
q.zh: 首届世界大赛是在何时举行的，参赛的是谁？

options.en: In 1920, between the New York Mets and the Yankees. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 1920年，由纽约大都会队和洋基队对阵。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: In 1903, between the Boston Americans (AL) and the Pittsburgh Pirates (NL).
options.zh: 1903年，由波士顿美国人队（美联）对阵匹兹堡海盗队（国联）。

options.en: In 1969, between the Miracle Mets and the Orioles.
options.zh: 1969年，由奇迹大都会队对阵金莺队。

options.en: In 1876, between the first National League teams.
options.zh: 1876年，由最早的国家联盟球队对阵。

explain.en: The book says that in 1903 the AL Boston Americans (nicknamed the Pilgrims) took on the NL's best, the Pittsburgh Pirates — the first World Series.
explain.zh: 书中说1903年美联的波士顿美国人队（绰号清教徒）对阵国联最强的匹兹堡海盗队——这就是首届世界大赛。

q.en: How many Major League Baseball teams are there, and how many games does each play?
q.zh: 美国职业棒球大联盟共有多少支球队，每队打多少场比赛？

options.en: 30 teams (15 in each league), and each plays 162 games.
options.zh: 30支球队（每联盟15支），每队打162场。

options.en: 16 teams, and each plays 100 games. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 16支球队，每队打100场。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: 20 teams, and each plays 200 games.
options.zh: 20支球队，每队打200场。

options.en: 32 teams, and each plays 81 games.
options.zh: 32支球队，每队打81场。

explain.en: The 'Road to the World Series' section says each of the thirty MLB teams (15 in each league) plays 162 games from April through September.
explain.zh: 在'通往世界大赛之路'一节，书中说三十支大联盟球队（每联盟15支）从4月到9月各打162场比赛。

q.en: In the playoffs, what does the term 'wild card' mean?
q.zh: 在季后赛中，'wild card'（外卡）一词是什么意思？

options.en: The best hitter on a team.
options.zh: 球队中最好的击球手。

options.en: A team with the next-best record that earns a playoff spot after the division leaders.
options.zh: 战绩仅次于分区冠军、在分区优胜者之后获得季后赛资格的球队。

options.en: A card game the players enjoy on the road. according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 球员在客场喜欢玩的一种纸牌游戏。（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: The team that wins the World Series trophy.
options.zh: 赢得世界大赛奖杯的球队。

explain.en: The glossary and playoff explanation define 'wild card' as a team chosen to compete after the division leaders have qualified; two such teams from each league play a one-game playoff.
explain.zh: 词汇表和季后赛说明把 wild card 定义为在分区冠军出线后获得参赛资格的球队；每联盟有两支外卡球队打一场附加赛。

q.en: What record did Christy Mathewson set in the 1905 World Series?
q.zh: Christy Mathewson 在1905年世界大赛中创下了什么纪录？

options.en: He stole home to win the series.
options.zh: 他盗本垒得分赢得系列赛。

options.en: He threw three shutouts over six days — 27 scoreless innings.
options.zh: 他在六天内投出三场完封——27局未失一分。

options.en: He hit three home runs in one game. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他在一场比赛中击出三支本垒打。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He caught a one-man triple play.
options.zh: 他完成了一人三杀。

explain.en: The book says that over six days in 1905, Mathewson threw three shutouts — 27 innings without a single run — a record never equaled.
explain.zh: 书中说1905年的六天内，Mathewson 投出三场完封——27局未失一分——这一纪录从未被追平。

q.en: In the glossary, what is a 'shutout'?
q.zh: 在词汇表中，'shutout'（完封）是什么？

options.en: A type of home run.
options.zh: 一种本垒打。

options.en: The player who bats first. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 第一个击球的球员。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The championship trophy.
options.zh: 冠军奖杯。

options.en: A game in which one side never scores.
options.zh: 一方始终未能得分的比赛。

explain.en: The glossary defines 'shutouts' as 'games in which one side never scores,' which is why Mathewson's three shutouts were so remarkable.
explain.zh: 词汇表把 shutouts 定义为'一方始终未得分的比赛'，这正是 Mathewson 三场完封如此了不起的原因。

q.en: What is the 'Miracle Mets' story about?
q.zh: '奇迹大都会'（Miracle Mets）的故事讲的是什么？

options.en: The Mets never won a single game.
options.zh: 大都会队一场都没赢过。

options.en: The Mets were founded back in 1903.
options.zh: 大都会队成立于1903年。

options.en: The 1969 Mets overcame 100-to-1 odds to reach and win the World Series.
options.zh: 1969年的大都会队以100比1的赔率逆袭，打进并赢得了世界大赛。

options.en: The Mets played in the 1956 perfect game. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 大都会队参加了1956年的完全比赛。（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Under 'Underdog Upset,' the book says the lowly 1969 Mets beat 100-to-1 odds, made the World Series, and overcame the favored Orioles 4-1, earning the nickname 'Miracle Mets.'
explain.zh: 在'Underdog Upset'一节，书中说弱小的1969年大都会队以100比1的赔率逆袭，打进世界大赛并4比1击败被看好的金莺队，得名'奇迹大都会'。

q.en: According to the book, which league won more World Series titles from 1903 to 2013?
q.zh: 根据书中内容，1903至2013年哪个联盟赢得的世界大赛冠军更多？

options.en: The American League, with 63 wins to the National League's 46.
options.zh: 美国联盟，63次夺冠，国家联盟为46次。

options.en: The National League, with 63 wins. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 国家联盟，63次夺冠。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: They were tied, with 50 wins each.
options.zh: 两队打平，各50次。

options.en: Neither league had any wins.
options.zh: 两个联盟都没赢过。

explain.en: The 'World Series Wins by League 1903-2013' chart shows the American League with 63 wins and the National League with 46.
explain.zh: '1903-2013年各联盟世界大赛夺冠数'图表显示美国联盟63次、国家联盟46次。

q.en: What feat did Reggie Jackson achieve in the 1977 World Series?
q.zh: Reggie Jackson 在1977年世界大赛中取得了什么成就？

options.en: He hit three home runs in a single game, each on the first pitch.
options.zh: 他在一场比赛中击出三支本垒打，而且每一支都是第一球就打出。

options.en: He called his shot like Babe Ruth. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他像 Babe Ruth 那样指了指要打的方向。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He made a one-man triple play.
options.zh: 他完成了一人三杀。

options.en: He pitched a perfect game.
options.zh: 他投出了一场完全比赛。

explain.en: The book says Reggie Jackson hit three home runs in Game 6 of the 1977 Series, all on the first pitch from different pitchers — the first to do so in a single Series game since Babe Ruth in 1928.
explain.zh: 书中说 Reggie Jackson 在1977年系列赛第6场击出三支本垒打，且每支都来自不同投手的第一球——这是继1928年 Babe Ruth 之后首位在单场系列赛中做到的人。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in writing this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To convince readers to play for the Yankees. according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 劝说读者去洋基队打球。（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: To teach readers how to pitch a baseball.
options.zh: 教读者如何投球。

options.en: To tell a fictional story about a pirate.
options.zh: 讲一个虚构的海盗故事。

options.en: To inform readers about the history and most memorable moments of the World Series.
options.zh: 向读者介绍世界大赛的历史与最令人难忘的时刻。

explain.en: The book explains the World Series' origin, how teams reach it, and highlights famous plays and players, so its purpose is to inform readers about this baseball event.
explain.zh: 本书讲解世界大赛的起源、球队如何晋级，并回顾著名球技与球员，因此目的是向读者介绍这项棒球盛事。

prompt.en: The book calls the World Series 'baseball's grandest stage' and shares stories of underdogs like the 1969 Mets. In your opinion, what makes a World Series moment 'memorable' — a great skill, a surprise upset, or something else? Use an example from the book.
prompt.zh: 书中称世界大赛为'棒球最宏大的舞台'，并讲述了像1969年大都会队这样的弱队逆袭故事。你认为是什么让世界大赛的某个瞬间'令人难忘'——精湛的技艺、意外的冷门，还是别的什么？请用书中的一个例子说明。

en: Think about the 1993 Joe Carter walk-off homer, the 1969 Miracle Mets beating 100-to-1 odds, or Reggie Jackson's three first-pitch home runs.
Consider why the book says the World Series became 'the climax of professional American sports.'
zh: 想想1993年 Joe Carter 的再见本垒打、1969年奇迹大都会队以100比1逆袭，或 Reggie Jackson 三支首球本垒打。
思考书中为何说世界大赛成了'美国职业体育的高潮'。
